data.content_en: Motor torque-speed performance curve showing intermittent and continuous duty ratings. Intermittent duty: 3.81 N·m flat from 0–3000 rpm, dropping to ~0.5 N·m at 5000 rpm. Continuous duty: 1.4 N·m flat from 0–3000 rpm, dropping to ~1.2 N·m then further at 5000 rpm.
